headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Joey Cantillo earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 2 RBI and 1 hit. Meanwhile, the New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles, with Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, with Addison Barger being placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026. Other players on the injured list include Eli White (concussion), Justin Verlander (left hip inflammation), Kerry Carpenter (left AC Joint Sprain), Edwin Díaz (right elbow loose bodies), Brock Stewart (left foot bone spur), Logan Webb (right knee bursitis), and Brandon Lockridge (right knee laceration and contusion).

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. Additionally, the Cleveland Guardians acquired catcher Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in a trade that also involved left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall to Guardians in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Joey Cantillo earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 2 RBI and 1 hit.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Baltimore**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles in their latest matchup. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after 6.1 innings of scoreless relief. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Addison Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
